scripts.site:deploy:staging: AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=$R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=$R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY aws s3 sync web/out/ s3://$STAGING_R2_BUCKET/ --endpoint-url https://$CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID.r2.cloudflarestorage.com --region auto --exclude '*' --include '*.html' --cache-control 'public, max-age=0, must-revalidate' --delete && AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=$R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=$R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY aws s3 sync web/out/ s3://$STAGING_R2_BUCKET/ --endpoint-url https://$CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID.r2.cloudflarestorage.com --region auto --exclude '*' --include '_next/static/**' --cache-control 'public, max-age=31536000, immutable' && AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=$R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=$R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY aws s3 sync web/out/ s3://$STAGING_R2_BUCKET/ --endpoint-url https://$CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID.r2.cloudflarestorage.com --region auto --exclude '*.html' --exclude '_next/static/**' --cache-control 'public, max-age=86400' --delete
scripts.site:deploy:production: AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=$R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=$R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY aws s3 sync web/out/ s3://$PRODUCTION_R2_BUCKET/ --endpoint-url https://$CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID.r2.cloudflarestorage.com --region auto --exclude '*' --include '*.html' --cache-control 'public, max-age=0, must-revalidate' --delete && AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=$R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=$R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY aws s3 sync web/out/ s3://$PRODUCTION_R2_BUCKET/ --endpoint-url https://$CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID.r2.cloudflarestorage.com --region auto --exclude '*' --include '_next/static/**' --cache-control 'public, max-age=31536000, immutable' && AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=$R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=$R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY aws s3 sync web/out/ s3://$PRODUCTION_R2_BUCKET/ --endpoint-url https://$CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID.r2.cloudflarestorage.com --region auto --exclude '*.html' --exclude '_next/static/**' --cache-control 'public, max-age=86400' --delete
scripts.claude: docker compose build && echo "\033[1;36m▶ Notifications: https://ntfy.sh/$NTFY_TOPIC\033[0m" && docker compose run --rm claude
